query:
SELECT 'positions' as tbl, status, COUNT(*) as cnt, ROUND(SUM(costBasis), 2) as total FROM positions GROUP BY status
UNION ALL
SELECT 'orders', status, COUNT(*), ROUND(SUM(amountUsd), 2) FROM orders GROUP BY status
ORDER BY tbl, status;
